case_title: TAMBARA, DAVID vs. KEIKOAN, GAIL et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAMBARA, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT KEIKOAN, GAIL FUJIMOTO, KYLE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          AUG-24-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-25-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-04-1993
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-24-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON AUG-24-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), WHY SANCTIONS SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AND FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES. HEARING SET FOR SEP-23-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-23-1993, OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED 8/19/93.
